BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX-CubeNTube
BundleInfo.Author: Tamino Cairoli
BundleInfo.Synopsis: Cube, Cylinder and Custom volume eraser tools.
BundleInfo.Description: A simple plugin that extends the eraser functionality of ChimeraX. It provides a cube, a cylinder and a custom shape eraser. The eraser tools are available in the Right Mouse toolbar.

Provider.name: cnt1
Provider.description: Erase parts of a density map with a cube, a cylinder or a custom shape

Classifiers.ChimeraXClassifier: Tool :: CubeNTube :: Volume Data :: Erase density map with a cube, cylinder or custom volume shape
Command :: volume cube erase :: Volume Data :: Erase part of a density map within a cube
Command :: volume cylinder erase :: Volume Data :: Erase part of a density map within a cylinder
